title: Smoky Portuguese Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender beef, smoky spices, and a hint of Portuguese flair.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine (if using) and beef broth. Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven. Braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
